titleStmt.title: SII 20.24: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 24. (B.K. No. 116 of 1938-39.) ĀḌŪR, HANGAL TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab standing in a field to the west of the village.

summary.p: This badly damaged record is dated Śaka 956, Bhāva, Saṁkrānti, Sunday. In the given year, corresponding to A.D. 1034-35 no Saṁkrānti occurred on a Sunday. The date cannot as such be verified.

It records that when Mahāmātya [Perggaḍe Mādimayya] was administering Banavāsi 12,000 (including Sāntaḷige 1000) and Mahāmṇḍalēs11vara Mayūrvarmma was governing the Pānumgal-500, gifts of land and garden, etc., were made to the temple of Banasaṁkaradēva by certain individuals, whose names are not clear. It gives the genealogical account of a certain Barma and seems to describe the glory of Vāmadēva who was the disciple of Dēvarāsi Jīyya and sthānādhipa of the Svayaṁbhū temple. This Vāmadēva was possibly the donee.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti samasta śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēsvara parama
bhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāsrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ jagadēka(malla)A few letters in smaller characters are engraved below this
mallakumāra śrīmajjayasiṁhadēvara rājyavuttarōttarābhivṛddhige sa
ḷuttire tatpādapadmōpajīvi samastarājyabhāranirūpita mahāmātyapa
davīvirājamāna mānōnnata prabhumaṁtrōtsāhaśaktitrayasaṁpannanasahāya
siṁhaṁ taguḻdiḷda baḍivaṁ duṣṭamanneya praḷayakāḷaṁ śrīmatperggaḍe mādimayyaṁ

sāṁtaḷige sāyiramoḷagāge banavāsipannircchāsiramumaṁ duṣṭanigraha visiṣṭapra
tipāḷanadiṁ perggeḍetanaṁgeyye samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṇḍa
ḷēsvaraṁ banavāsipuravarēsvaraṁ pāṁtipurādhipaṁ śrīmanmayūravarmmadēvaṁ
pānuṁgalaynāṟumanāḷdu sukhadindamarasugeyye . kenda . neṭṭane yirvvaṁgeyvara
muṭṭadeya kondadosedutāṁ dayeyiṁndaṁ biṭṭu nṛpaṁ kuḍe paḍedaṁ siṭṭige sale
negaḻda kuppagaḍeyaṁ barmmaṁ . kundigabhūpati tāṁ dayeyindaṁ kuḍe lōkapāṇḍiyū
raṁ paḍedoḷpindaṁ nindaṁ bammaṁ gaṇḍa Elarppogaḷe negaḻdanavanītaḷadoḷ . koḍeyade
sada jagadeyaṁbīvapaṭṭelli paḍedaṁ kundiganoḷpaḍedaṁ naḍunā
ḍatīrtthavī mahimegaḷaṁ . paṭṭavēdiyaṁ be baṭṭindaṁ kundigaṁ
paṁ biṭṭu nṛpaṁ kuḍe paḍedaṁ siṭṭige sale negaḻda barmananupamadharmmaṁ . Ātana kulava
dhu dharaṇījāteye dore kāḷiyabbeyavara magaṁ vikhyātayasaṁ kāḷiganene bhūtaḷado
ḷnegaḻdaḍe dānadharmasamētaṁ . sthira puḍivaṁ puruṣaguṇābharaṇaṁ kuḍalārppinadhikava
yendu pogaḷdu dhare kāḷiganesevanārppanoḷpaguṇamaṁ . Avananujaṁ
ripuge māri pagevara gaṇḍaṁ pravaṇaṁgaṁ jakkiganatidhavaḷa
yasaṁ negaḻdakāḷiganaṁ kaisurige . svasti yamaniyamasvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamaunā
nuṣṭāṇajapasamādhisaṁpannarappa svayaṁbhudēvara sthānādhipaHere is engraved in smaller characters, in two koyilāḷugaḷu biṭṭa dharṁmma hēṟiṁge vī�.
rappa dēvarāsijīyyara siṣyaṁ vāmadēva . bhaṁgiyindoḷaguḷḷaṁganeyara pu
traṁ gaṁgeyaṁgeraḍaltāḷdī jinadāsi . tuṁgaparākramaṁ piṁgadu manadiṁ tripuraṁga
ḷaniccātanabhayavakke pāṁgi mārmalevarggeyaṁgaja vairi tāṁ bhaṁgiyalta
padankakāṟa vāmadēvaṁ . negaḷdiṟuvattājanamaṁ migeyupavāsadoḷ
mallikārjjunavāsādrige pōgi kaṇḍu pūjisi maguḻdupavāsadoḷ vāmadēvarbbandu
parasurāmanivaroḷdōre kapiḷa vālmīkigaḷuṁdōre kāsyaparaṁ
peṟarddoṟeyillene negaḻdavāmadēvarddēvar . vasudheyane pāsi paḍevardda
deseyane pogevaṁdu tapōniṣṭekaraṁ śaśimauḷige bhaktaṁ manamosedīgupa
gge vāmadēva Avara maga nālegara saivayyanuṁ gojjiyabbeyuṁ saivē
svararmmo Arddhanāri Ādityadēvaṁ bāgilvāḍa paṁcamahāśabda
r . sakavarṣa 956 neya bhāvasaṁvatsarada saṁkrāṁti
Adi guṇasaṁpannaṁ sthira nuḍivātaṁ dharmmada mēru sōmēsvaradā
si pā vayyaṁ tanna māḍisida banasaṁkaradēvara dēgulakke
ya keyyaḷeyalmattareraḍu baradēya baruna
nūṟubaḷḷiya tōṁṭaṁ pattuṁ maneyane
vargge kālaṁ kaḻci koṭṭadavarī naiṣṭika sthānamaṁ
ḷiyade kādātaṁ vāraṇāsi kurukṣētra prayā
kōḍuṁ koḷagumaṁ ponnoḷkaṭṭisi vēdapāragarappa
brāhmaṇa koṭṭa phalamakkumidanaḷidaṁganitutīrtthado
ḷaṁ sāsira kavileyumaṁ sāsira mahābrāhmaṇarumaṁ sāsira divya
tapōdhanarumanaḷida pancamahāpātakanakkuṁ . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ
vā yō harēti vasundharā ṣaṣṭirvvariṣa sahaṣrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jāya
tē krimiḥ . tapadaṁkakāṟana .
deḷdeya rpārarigeyatibhaktaṁ nṟipapūjitaṁ
badly damaged
badly damaged
Digital edition of SII 20.24 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
